overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark rural environment at night, illuminated by a handheld torch. The character ascends wooden stairs and proceeds along a dirt path beside a wooden farmhouse, with the scene rendered in a realistic game engine.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase leading to elevated rural path

events.description: finishes ascending wooden stairs and steps onto flat dirt ground

agents.ego_description: holding a torch and climbing wooden stairs toward the farmhouse ahead

entered.detail: weathered wooden steps leading upward with visible grain and moss
thick wooden posts flanking both sides of the staircase
large two-story wooden building with dark timber walls visible in the torchlight
vertical wooden slats marking the property boundary

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wooden staircase illuminated by warm torchlight, with thick wooden posts flanking the path. A large wooden farmhouse looms in the darkness ahead to the right, partially obscured by the night.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside the wooden farmhouse, illuminating the ground ahead with the torch

entered.detail: uneven dirt trail with visible tire tracks and scattered stones
tall grass stretching into the darkness on the left side of the path
dark silhouettes of trees against the night sky in the distance

segments.scene_description: Moving along the dirt path, the wooden farmhouse now dominates the right side of the frame at close range, revealing detailed timber construction and a ladder attached to its wall. The torch illuminates the uneven ground ahead while grass fields and distant tree silhouettes fade into the surrounding darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a narrow ascent up wooden stairs toward a close-up approach of a rural farmhouse under the cover of night. It begins with the camera climbing a wooden staircase, where warm torchlight glints off thick flanking posts as a large farmhouse looms in the darkness to the right. As the character reaches the top, the perspective shifts onto a dirt path, bringing the detailed timber construction and an attached ladder of the farmhouse into sharp, dominating focus. The torchlight then sweeps across the uneven ground, revealing patches of grass and the silhouettes of distant trees that gradually fade into the surrounding blackness.
